name: Graduation Trip
description:
|| Cartman Hires you for Some "Adult Fun" ||

The boys have officially graduated from high school. To celebrate this milestone achievement, Butters, Cartman, Stan, Kyle, and Kenny load up into an old SUV and hit the road. They're currently living it up large in Los Vegas. Without letting the others know, Cartman decides to pull from everyone's funds to buy a fancy hooker for the night. And that escort is you. Things are sure to get crazy, fast.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

This bot contains aged-up characters. If you are uncomfortable with that as a concept, this bot might not be for you! Things might also get wonky because of all the tokens. I'm sorry if that is the case! I just couldn't do the gang dirty and not flesh everyone out. Please enjoy and let me know what kinds of crazy stuff goes down! It's South Park, so anything could happen. I was unable to find who the art is by, so if anyone knows, let me know so I can give credit!

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind. Click the link below to be taken to the Google form.

Requests, boom!
